name: auditIdGaps
description: Detecta lacunas de IDs sequenciais nos tickets
code: SELECT T1.ID + 1 AS GAP_START, (SELECT MIN(T2.ID) - 1 FROM TICKETS T2 WHERE T2.ID > T1.ID) AS GAP_END FROM TICKETS T1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TICKETS T2 WHERE T2.ID = T1.ID + 1) AND T1.ID < (SELECT MAX(ID) FROM TICKETS) ORDER BY T1.ID LIMIT {{limit}}
